name: Chili Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together except the shredded cheddar cheese in a bowl.
2. Heat the mixture in the microwave until warmed through.
3. Add the shredded cheddar cheese and stir gently.
4. Serve with your favorite chips.
5. For those who like things a little hotter, you can also add 1/4 cup of Monterey Jack cheese with Jalapenos before serving.
